title: Recessed belt loop
abstract: A garment may include a body having a channel and a belt loop extending along and at least partially recessed within the channel.
claims: 1. A garment comprising: a body comprising: a waist band portion comprising: a first panel having a first upper in turned end portion and a first lower in turned end portion; and a second panel having a second upper in turned end portion and a second lower in turned end portion, the second panel comprising: a first segment inwardly curled in a first direction to form a first folded edge; and a second segment inwardly curled in a second direction, opposite the first direction, to form a second folded edge, the first folded edge and the second folded edge being spaced by a channel therebetween; and a lower suspended portion hanging from the waist band portion and comprising a third panel having an upper portion sandwiched between the first lower in turned end portion and the second lower in turned end portion; a floor panel forming a floor of the channel; and a belt loop extending along and at least partially recessed within the channel, the belt loop comprising a fourth panel, the fourth panel comprising: an upper portion wrapping about the floor panel and sandwiched between the first upper in turned end portion and the floor panel; and a lower portion wrapping about the floor panel and sandwiched between the first lower in turned end portion and the floor panel.
